description:
Evaluate the annual energy consumption of a house at 20%, 40%, and 60% Window-to-Wall Ratios (WWR) in Chicago, IL, and compile the results into a CSV file.

Starting State: Energy3D is open with the `building-passive-heating.ng3` sample project loaded.

Expected Actions:
1. Change the project's Location (city) to Chicago, IL.
2. Set the Window-to-Wall Ratio (WWR) for all walls of the building to 20%.
3. Run the 'Annual Energy Analysis' (from the Analysis menu) and record the Total energy value (in kWh) displayed on the resulting bar chart.
4. Repeat the simulation process for WWR = 40% and WWR = 60%, recording the new Total energy value for each run.
5. Create a text file at `~/Documents/Energy3D/wwr_results.csv` with the exact header `WWR,Total_Energy_kWh` and three rows for your three test runs (e.g., `20,15420.5`).
6. Save your final project state (which should now have WWR set to 60% and location set to Chicago) to `~/Documents/Energy3D/chicago_wwr_60.ng3`.
